positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial scene featuring a cosmic nebula swirl merging with geometric constellations. The main subject is a graceful, abstract rendition of a crescent moon encircled by glowing, stylized star paths and vibrant, interlocking sapphire blue and deep amethyst purple nebulae. Use a flat, graphic vector art style with bold outlines and high contrast. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, designed to look excellent as an apparel print. Perfect for screen printing, clean edges, and striking visual impact. Minimal details, maximum impact. Cosmic vibes, astral projection, ethereal, modern art.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, noisy, text, signature, watermark, logos, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, bokeh, grainy
